name: Spicy Hash Browns
recipeIngredient: 25 lb Potatoes, peel, cook until tender, drain, chill, grate
4 Jars Pimientos, drain and chop (4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute ham, onions, and peppers in 1/4 cup butter until tender.
2. Cool mixture for 10 minutes.
3. Add to grated potatoes.
4. Stir in chopped pimientos and seasonings.
5. Cook potatoes on a griddle in remaining butter until browned.
6. Turn over and cook the second side until browned.
7. Place half of the potatoes on a platter, top with cheese.
8. Return remaining potatoes to the griddle and finish cooking.
